from IPython.display import HTML

HTML("""
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<style>
body {
    margin: 0;
    font-family: Arial;
    text-align: center;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff758c, #ff7eb3);
    color: white;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.screen { display: none; padding: 40px; }
.active { display: block; }

button {
    padding: 15px 25px;
    margin: 10px;
    border-radius: 30px;
    border: none;
    background: #ff4b5c;
    color: white;
    font-size: 18px;
    cursor: pointer;
}

button:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }

#noBtn { position: absolute; }

input {
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: none;
}

.heart {
    font-size: 60px;
    animation: float 1.5s infinite alternate;
}

@keyframes float {
    from {transform: translateY(0);}
    to {transform: translateY(-20px);}
}

img {
    max-width: 80%;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 40px pink;
    animation: fadeIn 2s ease-in-out;
}

@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {opacity:0;}
    to {opacity:1;}
}
</style>
</head>

<body>

<div id="s1" class="screen active">
<h1>For You ❤️</h1>
<p>I made this just for you 💌</p>
<button onclick="next(2)">Start 💖</button>
</div>

<div id="s2" class="screen">
<h2>Do you love me? 😏</h2>
<button onclick="next(3)">YES 😍</button>
<button id="noBtn" onmouseover="moveNo()">NO 🙄</button>
</div>

<div id="s3" class="screen">
<h2>I knew it 😌</h2>
<p>What am I to you?</p>
<button onclick="next(4)">My person ❤️</button>
<button onclick="next(4)">My happiness 😊</button>
<button onclick="next(4)">My everything 💖</button>
</div>

<div id="s4" class="screen">
<h2>What do you love most?</h2>
<button onclick="next(5)">My smile 😊</button>
<button onclick="next(5)">My care 🥺</button>
<button onclick="next(5)">Everything 💕</button>
</div>

<div id="s5" class="screen">
<h2>Rate us 💫</h2>
<button onclick="next(6)">1 ❤️</button>
<button onclick="next(6)">2 ❤️</button>
<button onclick="next(6)">3 ❤️</button>
<button onclick="next(6)">4 ❤️</button>
<button onclick="next(6)">5 ❤️</button>
</div>

<div id="s6" class="screen">
<h2>One word for me?</h2>
<input placeholder="Type here...">
<br><br>
<button onclick="next(7)">Submit 💌</button>
</div>

<div id="s7" class="screen">
<h2>Promise me 💍</h2>
<button onclick="next(8)">Always ❤️</button>
<button onclick="next(8)">Forever 💖</button>
</div>

<div id="s8" class="screen">
<h2 class="heart">❤️</h2>
<p>You make my life better 🥺</p>
<button onclick="next(9)">Next</button>
</div>

<div id="s9" class="screen">
<h2>Ready for surprise? 🎁</h2>
<button onclick="next(10)">YES 😍</button>
</div>

<div id="s10" class="screen">
<h1>Final Surprise 💖</h1>

<p>
You are my today, tomorrow and forever ❤️<br><br>
I love you so much 🥺
</p>

<img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
">

<p style="font-size:22px;">
My person. My home. My everything 💕
</p>

</div>

<script>
function next(n){
    let screens = document.getElementsByClassName("screen");
    for(let i=0;i<screens.length;i++){
        screens[i].classList.remove("active");
    }
    document.getElementById("s"+n).classList.add("active");
}

function moveNo(){
    let btn = document.getElementById("noBtn");
    btn.style.left = Math.random()*80 + "%";
    btn.style.top = Math.random()*80 + "%";
}
</script>

</body>
</html>
""")
